issues.description: Evidence gathering aborted at honesty verification stage (gathering_status: partial_honesty_abort). No independent test execution, coverage analysis, BDD verification, or architectural review was performed. All validation fields are null.
issues.requirement: All acceptance criteria require independent verification
issues.suggestion: Fix honesty discrepancies in the Player's report generator, then re-run validation to completion so independent tests can execute.

issues.description: Malformed file path in completion_promises[0].test_file: 'tests/integration/test_store_semantics.py, tests/integration/test_pool_lifecycle.py' is a comma-separated string, not a valid single path. This caused a critical honesty discrepancy.
issues.suggestion: Fix the report generator to emit test_file as either a single path string or a proper JSON array, not a comma-separated list.

issues.description: Player claimed work on 7 files that exist and are tracked but were not modified this turn (coverage.json, coverage_integration.json, test_integration_output.txt, tests/integration/conftest.py, tests/integration/test_pool_lifecycle.py, tests/integration/test_store_semantics.py, tests/unit/test_app_lifespan.py). These appear to be orchestrator-managed paths incorrectly included in files_modified/files_created or implementation_files.
issues.suggestion: Filter orchestrator-managed paths (e.g., under .guardkit/autobuild/ or coverage*.json) from report fields. Only claim files the Player agent directly modified.

criteria_verification.notes: Cannot verify: evidence_bundle.tests is null and evidence_bundle.independent_tests is null due to gathering_status: partial_honesty_abort. No independent confirmation that 'python -m pytest tests/integration/ -m integration -v --timeout=120' passes or that tests avoid NAS DSN references. Player's self-report is unverified.

Cannot verify: No independent test execution (tests: null). Player claims test 'test_round_trip_preserves_content_and_timestamps' exists and passes, but this is self-reported without independent confirmation.

Cannot verify: No independent test execution (tests: null). Player claims 'test_upsert_replaces_existing_record' and 'test_delete_removes_from_get_and_search' exist and pass, but this is self-reported without independent confirmation.

Cannot verify: No independent test execution (tests: null). Player claims 'test_semantic_search_ranking_with_real_embeddings' exists (skipped when FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL unset, but code complete), but this is self-reported without independent confirmation of the test implementation or real nomic round-trip.

Cannot verify: No independent test execution (tests: null). Player claims three tests verify pool lifecycle (no leak, idempotent setup, connect-timeout), but this is self-reported without independent confirmation. ASSUM-006 observation claimed but not independently verified.

Cannot verify: No independent test execution (tests: null). Player claims 'test_pool_pressure_concurrent_operations' verifies ASSUM-004 (15 concurrent operations against pg_pool_max=10 all complete within 30s), but this is self-reported without independent confirmation.

rationale: Gathering status 'partial_honesty_abort' means evidence collection stopped before independent validation could execute. All validation evidence (tests, coverage, BDD) is null — this is ABSENT SIGNAL per .claude/rules/absence-of-failure-is-not-success.md. The Player's self-reported completion_promises cannot serve as verification when independent tests were never run. Additionally, the honesty check found a critical malformed file path and 7 should-fix discrepancies claiming work on unmodified files. After fixing the report generator's honesty issues, the orchestrator should re-run validation to completion so that independent tests can verify the Player's implementation claims.
